definition: a group or set of twelve

word: His birthday is on the eighteenth of July.
He finished in eighth place in the race.
definition: constituting number eight in a sequence; one of eight equal parts

word: She finished the race in eleventh place.
Today is the fifteenth of May.
definition: constituting number fifteen in a sequence; 15th

word: This is the fifth time I've asked you.

definition: The ordinal number corresponding to fifty.

word: Today is the fourteenth of July.
definition: coming after the thirteenth in order

word: This is the hundredth time I've told you!
definition: one of 100 equal parts; the ordinal number after ninety-ninth

word: Today is the nineteenth of July.
Today is the seventeenth of May.
Today is the sixteenth of December.
definition: the ordinal number corresponding to the number sixteen

word: Today is the thirteenth of the month.
definition: constituting number thirteen in a sequence

word: Her birthday is on the twelfth of December.
Today is the twentieth of May.
